title: TrackOne commitment fact JSON projection
description: JSON projection shape used by the trackone-canonical-cbor-v1 vector corpus before deterministic JSON-to-CBOR encoding. This is a conformance-corpus projection shape, not the runtime fact.schema.json shape.

pod_id.description: Projection identifier string. This corpus does not require the runtime hex16 pod_id form.

fc.description: Frame counter encoded as a JSON integer in the uint64 range.

ingest_time.description: UTC ingest timestamp rendered as RFC3339 text with a Z suffix.

pod_time.description: UTC pod timestamp rendered as RFC3339 text with a Z suffix, or explicit null when unavailable. The field is required; absence and null are not equivalent.

kind.description: Projection fact kind. The vector corpus uses lower-case dotted names such as env.sample.

payload.description: Sensor/application payload. Payload keys are open, but values must stay within JSON value types supported by the deterministic JSON-to-CBOR profile.

ingest_time_rfc3339_utc.description: Optional compatibility timestamp. Omit when unset; do not encode as null.

signature.description: Optional detached signature text. Omit when unset; do not encode as null.
